productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Navy Blue Corona Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteDesigned for those who love those healthy runs, the adidas Corona combines lightweight breathable comfort and flexibility that makes running all the more pleasurable.Product DetailsWhite and navy blue shoe with full mesh upper, synthetic overlays, reinforced overlay at the heel counter and central lace-upsPadded and meshed inner and tongueFoamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with deep flex grooves, arrow shaped lugs and arched midfootMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
